family: S3M Timing Belt - High Torque (Closed End)

configuration.type_prefix: HTUN (Polyurethane main body, Aramid core wire)

alternative_candidate.note: Same price/lead-time as primary; resolved cleanly but evidence depth (CAD) NOT pulled per breadth-first rule -- spec page only.

type_codes.HTBN: Rubber (Chloroprene back/tooth rubber, fiberglass core wire, nylon tooth fabric)
type_codes.HTUN: Polyurethane (Aramid fiber core wire); cannot be tensioned from back side

pn_grammar.circumference_length_mm_field: must equal one of the catalog's discrete published lengths (see spec table); equals number_of_teeth * 3 mm pitch
pn_grammar.evidence_basis: manufacturer-confirmed -- read directly off the resolved/configured product detail page (Configured Specifications block), not inferred

cad_files.fetch_method: in-page fetch via cadFormatList -> cadDownload -> GET zip (hands-off, MSM1 brand)

drawing_status: RETRIEVED (generic family tooth-profile drawing; does not depict the loop/circumference -- that is a configured BOM parameter, not a drawn dimension)
known_caveats: CAD body is a SIMPLIFIED placeholder: a rounded-end extruded strip (~256 mm visible span x 10 mm x 10 mm cross-section, 1032 verts, non-watertight, ~4399 mm^3). It does NOT model teeth or the closed-loop shape. CAD is therefore only useful for width/thickness bounding-box checks, NOT for tooth-mesh geometry or true loop-path geometry. Tooth geometry (pitch 3, Ra 1.95, Lr 1.95, H 1.94, h 1.14, PLD 0.381, unit mass 15.0 g/m for PU @10mm) is manufacturer-confirmed from the family spec table, not from CAD.

The visible CAD X-extent (~256 mm) does not equal the 540 mm circumference; the model is not a true unrolled or looped representation of the belt -- do not attempt to derive circumference from this mesh.
